subcodes.title: Words related on various occasions to Nabil-i-A'zam
subcodes.first_line: All those who were struck down by the storm that raged during that memorable year in Tihran... We were all huddled together in one cell… God is sufficient unto me; He verily is the All-sufficing!  In Him let the trusting trust.
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الله یکفی عن کل شئ وعلى الله فلیتوکل المتوکلون
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @accounts of dreams and visions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @incarceration of Baha'u'llah in Siyah Chal, @suffering and imprisonment
